name: Guanfu Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Guanfu Holding Co., Ltd. provides plastic raw material procurement services through e-commerce platform in China. The company also engages in the research and development, production, and sale of pharmaceutical raw materials and animal nutrition. In addition, the company is involved in the real estate leasing and gold mining activities. It serves 80,000 users. The company was formerly known as Fujian Guanfu Modern Household Wares Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guanfu Holding Co., Ltd. in August 2016. Guanfu Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Quanzhou, China.
